---
title: "My Projects"
---

## Data Analytics

### [Credit Card Fraud Detection with Machine Learning](posts/fraud-detection/index.qmd)

**Tools:** Python · scikit-learn · imbalanced-learn · pandas · seaborn

Analyzed 284,807 European credit card transactions to detect fraud in a severely imbalanced dataset (only 0.17% fraud). Applied random undersampling to address class imbalance, then compared **Logistic Regression** and **Decision Tree** classifiers using Precision, Recall, ROC AUC, and Precision-Recall AUC.

Key findings: Logistic Regression achieved ROC AUC = 0.976 and caught 91.8% of fraudulent transactions, significantly outperforming the Decision Tree (ROC AUC = 0.908). PCA-transformed features (V14, V17, V12) were the strongest predictors of fraud.

---

## Marketing Analytics

### A/B Testing a Call to Action

**Tools:** Python · statsmodels · scipy

Replicated Karlan & List (2007) — a large-scale field experiment on charitable giving — to examine whether donation matching ratios affect donor behavior. Found that *any* match offer increases response rates by ~22%, but a 3:1 match is no more effective than a 1:1 match.

---

## Web Development

Built this portfolio website using [Quarto](https://quarto.org).
